info.title: Logistics - temu.logistics.shiplogisticstype.get
info.description: You can get all online ship logistics type information from this api. After that, they can call "bg.logistics.shipment.create" to buy-shipping on Temu. Once you choose to buy-shipping with ship logistics type, Temu will automatically chose the most recommended channel id and buy-shipping for you.

post.summary: You can get all online ship logistics type information from this api. After that, they can call "bg.logistics.shipment.create" to buy-shipping on Temu. Once you choose to buy-shipping with ship logistics type, Temu will automatically chose the most recommended channel id and buy-shipping for you.
post.description: You can get all online ship logistics type information from this api. After that, they can call "bg.logistics.shipment.create" to buy-shipping on Temu. Once you choose to buy-shipping with ship logistics type, Temu will automatically chose the most recommended channel id and buy-shipping for you.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Temu router request body. The `type` field must be `temu.logistics.shiplogisticstype.get`.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: access_token
x-temu-common-parameters.description: A secure token for access control.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: timestamp
x-temu-common-parameters.description: The timestamp is in UNIX time format (seconds), with a length of 10 digits, and should be within a range of 300 seconds before the current time to 300 seconds after the current time.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: data_type
x-temu-common-parameters.description: The data format of the request response is fixed as JSON for optional parameters.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: version
x-temu-common-parameters.description: API version, defaults to V1, no need to pass this parameter if not required.

rows.Error Message: System abnormality, please check the data and try again

rows.logistics Status: Pre-shipment
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: 预上网节点
rows.State corresponds to event（EN）: Initial scanning before the package is officially shipped and tracked by the carrier.

rows.logistics Status: 尾程物流商的信息通知
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: Information update provided by the final delivery carrier.

rows.logistics Status: 尾程服务商生成的call label信息预报
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: Advance information of a call label generated by the last-mile service provider.

rows.logistics Status: 服务商交邮前的转运节点，例如交邮上网前的“卡转”等；是在尾程物流商官网无法查询到的节点内容
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: Movement of goods before being handed to the postal service, usually not visible on the last-mile carrier's official tracking.

rows.group: Local Logistics provider ask for an extra charge
rows.logistics Status: 尾程物流商向消费者收费
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: The end delivery carrier requests an extra payment from the recipient.

rows.logistics Status: 货物交邮后，到最后一公里派送点的一切非异常状态
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: All normal statuses after the goods are handed to the postal service until they reach the last-mile delivery point.

rows.logistics Status: 货物从清关完成后，到尾程派送点的一切异常状态
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: All exception statuses occurring after customs clearance is completed and before reaching the last-mile delivery point.

rows.logistics Status: 尾程服务商首次揽收上网
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: The initial pickup and scanning of the package by the last-mile service provider.

rows.logistics Status: 取件失败，客户（例如半托管商家）跟揽收人说不寄了等揽收失败的情况
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: The pickup attempt was unsuccessful (e.g., customer canceled the shipment).

rows.logistics Status: 尾程段，货物进入揽收服务商仓库
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: Goods have entered the warehouse of the pickup carrier in the last-mile segment.

rows.logistics Status: 尾程段，货物从揽收服务商仓库出库
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: Goods have departed from the warehouse of the pickup carrier in the last-mile segment.

rows.logistics Status: 半托管包裹跨国运输中
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: A semi-managed package is currently being transported across international borders.

rows.logistics Status: 将包裹交付尾程服务商
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: The package has been transferred to the final delivery service provider.

rows.logistics Status: 非尾程服务商生成的call label信息预报
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: Advance information of a call label that was not generated by the last-mile service provider.

rows.logistics Status: 到达目的站台
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: The goods have arrived at the destination terminal.

rows.group: Picked up by Customs clearance company
rows.logistics Status: 清关前清关承运商提货(清关服务商回传的提货节点)
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: Goods are collected by the customs clearance carrier before the customs clearance process begins.

rows.logistics Status: 进口清关完成放行
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: Import customs procedures have been finished, and the goods are cleared for release.

rows.logistics Status: 清关延误
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: There is a hold-up or delay in the customs clearance process.

rows.logistics Status: 清关承运商回传的货物交付节点
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: The point at which goods are delivered, as reported back by the customs clearance carrier.

rows.logistics Status: 清关放行后、尾程揽收前，卡转服务商提走货物
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: After customs release but before last-mile pickup, goods are taken by a truck transfer service provider.

rows.logistics Status: 半托管包裹转运到达目的仓库入库
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: A semi-managed package has been transferred and received into the destination warehouse.

rows.logistics Status: 清关放行后、尾程揽收前的转运环节
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: The movement of goods after they have been released by customs and before they are picked up for the last-mile delivery.

rows.logistics Status: Arrived at Post Office
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: 货物到达尾程派送点
rows.State corresponds to event（EN）: The goods have reached the final delivery point (e.g., local post office or distribution center).

rows.logistics Status: 货物从尾程派送点，到客户签收前的一切非异常状态
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: All non-exception statuses from the last-mile delivery point until before the customer's sign-off.

rows.logistics Status: 货物从尾程派送点，到客户签收前的一切非客户拒收的异常状态（不确定是否已尝试派送）
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: All exception statuses (excluding customer rejection) from the last-mile delivery point to before sign-off (uncertain if delivery attempted).

rows.logistics Status: 货物已经尝试送达客户，但不确定失败原因
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: A delivery attempt was made to the customer, but the specific reason for failure is not clear.

rows.logistics Status: 货物已经尝试送达客户，但客户拒绝、地址不详、电话联系不到等派送失败的状态
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: Delivery was attempted but failed due to reasons like customer refusal, insufficient address, or inability to contact the recipient.

rows.logistics Status: 货物到达派送阶段后，用户要求指定时间或者更改地址派送
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: After the package reaches the delivery stage, a specific delivery time or address change is confirmed per customer request.

rows.logistics Status: 由于服务商原因造成的派送失败，例如damage
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: Delivery failed due to reasons attributable to the carrier, such as damage to the package.

rows.logistics Status: 包裹发生退件的场景
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: The scenario where the package is being returned to the sender.

rows.group: The undelivered package is returned and Available for Pickup
rows.logistics Status: 未妥投的包裹发生退件并送到海外仓附近自提点，等待仓库提取
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: An undelivered package is returned and placed at a pickup point near the overseas warehouse, awaiting retrieval by the warehouse.

rows.logistics Status: 货物送到自提点，等客户提取
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: The goods have been delivered to a pickup point and are waiting for customer collection.

rows.logistics Status: Delivered
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: 签收状态
rows.State corresponds to event（EN）: The package has been successfully delivered and signed for by the recipient.

rows.logistics Status: Carrier accepted the claimed of Missing Parcel
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: 包裹已经丢失，例如lost、stolen
rows.State corresponds to event（EN）: The package is confirmed to be lost or stolen.

rows.group: The undelivered package is returned and delivered
rows.logistics Status: 未妥投的包裹发生退件并完成送达到海外仓，即“退件签收”
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: An undelivered package has been returned and successfully delivered to the overseas warehouse ("Return shipment signed for").

rows.logistics Status: Others
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: 轨迹匹配不到任何节点的情况
rows.State corresponds to event（EN）: The tracking information does not match any known status nodes.

rows.logistics Status: 来自服务商、尾程物流商官方API的轨迹，官网没有展示，是我们不需要且不对消费者进行展示的轨迹
rows.State corresponds to event（中文）: Tracking information from carrier APIs not displayed on their official websites and not required or shown to consumers.

type.description: API name,eg:bg.* Must be `temu.logistics.shiplogisticstype.get` for this operation.

access_token.description: A secure token for access control.

timestamp.description: The timestamp is in UNIX time format (seconds), with a length of 10 digits, and should be within a range of 300 seconds before the current time to 300 seconds after the current time.

data_type.description: The data format of the request response is fixed as JSON for optional parameters.

version.description: API version, defaults to V1, no need to pass this parameter if not required.
